headline: JP Morgan Maintains Neutral on Host Hotels & Resorts, Raises Price Target to $25
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Daniel Politzer   maintains Host Hotels & Resorts (NASDAQ:HST) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $22 to $25.

headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Host Hotels & Resorts, Raises Price Target to $24
summary: Barclays  analyst Richard Hightower   maintains Host Hotels & Resorts (NASDAQ:HST) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $23 to $24.

headline: Host Hotels & Resorts Is The Hot Hotel REIT This Earnings Season
summary: Host Hotels & Resorts (HST) is a Buy: strong earnings momentum, luxury tailwinds, renovations, and attractive P/FFO. See more here.
